alt_part_number.description: An alternative identifier used to identify a part, such as Drawing #, or customer / supplier part number.

alt_rev.description: An alternate part revision, such as a drawing revision, or customer / supplier part revision.

alt_part_number2.description: A second alternative identifier used to identify a part, such as Drawing #, or customer / supplier part number.

alt_rev2.description: A second alternate part revision, such as a drawing revision, or customer / supplier part revision.

plan_count.description: The number of plans this Part Master is associated with.

ncr_count.description: The number of NCRs this Part Master is associated with.

type.description: Identify if the part is part of a regular part, tabulated part, or the parent tabulated part

parent_part_number.description: The part number of the parent part if this part is a Table of Size entry.

parent_rev.description: The part revision of the parent part if this part is a Table of Size entry.

unit.description: Unit used for determine part cost. (Optional)

is_library.description: If true, indicates the part is setup as a library for a Spec Library.

is_assembly.description: If true, indicates part is an assembly.

is_itar.description: If true, indicates part is an ITAR part with additional controls.

has_ppap.description: If true, indicates part has PPAP documents.

is_buy.description: If true, indicates part is bought, rather than made. (Optional)

comments.example: This is a brand new part that we are prototyping.
